Video.summary: A surprise confession changes the course of Johnathan and McKenzie's budding relationship.
Video.title: Renneberg vs. Peterson

Video.summary: An Arkansas woman accuses her husband of being addicted to pornography.
Video.title: Holmes vs. Holmes

Video.summary: Brian is being sued by his wife Doretha for an illegal eviction after she left when he brought another woman home.
Video.title: Three's a Crowd

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: A battling couple face off in court over trust, heartbreak and the custody of their beloved rabbit, Oreo.
Video.title: McCoy vs. Norman

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Laura is suing her ex-friend and workmate for a loan. Caylee says Laura offered money without any obligations!
Video.title: The Devil's in the Details

Video.summary: Johnny is suing his former friend for costs stemming from a botched dog-sitting deal.
Video.title: Sin and Tonic

Video.summary: Natash is suing her younger sister for damages from to her home from wild parties that she threw.
Video.title: House Party

Video.summary: Melvin is suing a real estate broker for a bogus electric bill and lost rent, claiming she stole his identity to pay her bills. Jacqueline catogorically denies any of Melvin outrageous claims.
Video.title: Buyers are Liars

Video.summary: While shopping for a website designer Brent met Joe but what a tangle website of woes did they weave.
Video.title: Website of Woes

Video.summary: Yumari defends her loyalty and the paternity of her children as Larry questions everything in a custody battle.
Video.title: Hammen vs. Hamrick

Video.summary: Harmoni suspects Jarren is cheating and has demanded he take a polygraph to prove his fidelity.
Video.title: Lockhart vs Reid

Video.summary: An entertainer seeks help from the judges on how to deal with his girlfriend’s insecurity surrounding his line of work.
Video.title: Obiowo vs. Vranas

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: A workplace romance takes a dramatic turn as Jarius seeks the truth about his paternity of 1-year-old Legacii.
Video.title: Childs vs. Macon

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: Jane claims her ex-husband of 25 years owes her over $3,000 for their son's wedding.
Video.title: Exes Wedding War

Video.summary: Two sisters feud over the family heritance ends up in Judge Marilyn Milian's court room
Video.title: Sister Steals Family Inheritance

Video.summary: Jennifer is accusing Michelle of causing the car crash and is suing her for the damages to her car.
Video.title: Fender Bender Fiasco

Video.summary: Deborah Estrella says she went to the defendant’s hair salon because her hair was black and orange, and she wanted to change it to a light blond uniform color. Well, the woman ruined the job. She was left with four different colors in her hair, making her look like a freak. She’s suing for the $740 she paid and also the cost to redo her hair. The Defendant refuses to believe she messed up and is accused of being shady.
Video.title: Being Shady

Video.summary: Karen Steinhaus sues landscaper Don for $1,500, claiming he took her money but never completed yard work or removed a tree. Don, with 35 years of experience, counters that he did most of the job and delays were weather-related.
Video.title: Tree-Trimming Turmoil

Video.summary: Alisha is being sued by her step father, but says she owes him nothing after he put her in foster care.
Video.title: Coping with Family Chaos

Video.summary: Terry is suing his ex-wife because he lent her money for their daughter (18) to have surgery on her jaw.
Video.title: A Host of Issues

Video.summary: A woman hired her friend of 15 years to do her son's and husband's tax returns, but says the friend failed to complete them, so she's suing for a refund.
Video.title: H&R Best Friend

Video.summary: Jada is suing her mother for $4,000 in unreturned property after kicking her out of the house.
Video.title: Smart Mouth and Bad Attitude

Video.summary: Corina broke up with Anthony after choking her but after finding out she's pregnant, sues for child support.
Video.title: Get It On Record

Video.summary: Prestonie sues his mother for assault and hotel bills and claims she admitted to hating him.
Video.title: Mommy Issues

Video.summary: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for emotional distress and claims she trapped him into a relationship and gave him an S.T.D.
Video.title: You Gave Me The Ick!

Video.summary: Carol is suing her husband for using her money for a bachelor party. Marion argues it was a joint account.
Video.title: The Wedding Thief

Video.summary: Christopher is suing his brother Ashlee for punches his tooth out over some spilled juice.
Video.title: My House My Couch

Video.summary: Kim Savage claims her brother John owes her rent and money for appliances, while John argues that he paid the rent and wants to be compensated for the emotional distress he encountered when he and his three children were tossed out on the street.
Video.title: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Image.alt: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: An uncooperative felon tests the patience of the SED.
Video.title: Special Enforcement Detail Work

Video.summary: Deputy Campora arrests two men in possession of drugs and with felony warrants. Deputies Brady and Ford enforce a restraining order.
Video.title: What Bump in My Pants?

Video.summary: Deputy Adams eradicates an indoor and outdoor marijuana grow.
Video.title: But I have a Prescription!

Video.summary: Deputy Turnbull makes a visit to a known flop house.
Video.title: Dopers Come Together

Video.summary: Deputy Payne responds to a vehicle on fire with a teenager trapped inside.
Video.title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Image.alt: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Video.summary: Deputy Miller gets physical with an aggressive transient. Deputy Turnbull demonstrates an exercise in mental gymnastics.
Video.title: Hostile & Homeless

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt attempts to find the man responsible for giving his girlfriend a black eye. A woman is arrested behind a closed business in the middle of the night.
Video.title: Abusing and Abusers

Video.summary: Deputy Payne exposes the jumbled and dysfunctional mind of a habitual alcoholic.
Video.title: Drunk as a Skunk

Video.summary: WENET and the SED demonstrate a large scale marijuana bust near an elementary school.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Image.alt: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Video.summary: Nevada Parole Agents arrest a traffic accident victim. An offender gets arrested for his laptop's contents.
Video.title: Right Place Right Time

Video.summary: A parolee is arrested after hiding in a box. Agents detain a parolee after he fails a voluntary test.
Video.title: Boxed In

Video.summary: A tip leads Nevada Parole Officers to a stand off. Michigan agents catch a suspect who failed to report.
Video.title: Neighborhood Watch

Video.summary: A parolee pretends to be asleep to fool off agents. Agents pay a gang member a surprise home visit.
Video.title: Sleeping Parole

Video.summary: Parole agents wait to arrest a parolee at his hotel. A parolee's girlfriend lends agents a hand.
Video.title: Reprobates Hotel
